content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_customers', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_customers;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_customers
    @load_run_id VARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE silver.customers;

    INSERT INTO silver.customers
    (
        customer_id,
        customer_name,
        city,
        signup_date
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(customer_id)) AS INT)            AS customer_id,
        LTRIM(RTRIM(customer_name))                           AS customer_name,
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(city)), '')                        AS city,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(signup_date)) AS DATE)           AS signup_date
    FROM bronze.customers;
END;
GO


IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_products', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_products;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_products
    @load_run_id VARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE silver.products;

    INSERT INTO silver.products
    (
        product_id,
        product_name,
        category,
        unit_price
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(product_id)) AS INT)             AS product_id,
        LTRIM(RTRIM(product_name))                            AS product_name,
        NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(category)), '')                    AS category,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(unit_price)) AS DECIMAL(18,2))   AS unit_price
    FROM bronze.products;
END;
GO


IF OBJECT_ID('silver.sp_load_orders', 'P') IS NOT NULL
    DROP PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_orders;
GO

CREATE PROCEDURE silver.sp_load_orders
    @load_run_id VARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE silver.orders;

    INSERT INTO silver.orders
    (
        order_id,
        customer_id,
        product_id,
        quantity,
        order_date
    )
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(order_id)) AS INT)               AS order_id,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(customer_id)) AS INT)            AS customer_id,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(product_id)) AS INT)             AS product_id,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(quantity)) AS INT)               AS quantity,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(order_date)) AS DATE)            AS order_date
    FROM bronze.orders;
END;
GO
